provenance.source_corpus: Assessing significant geomorphic changes and effectiveness of dynamic restoration in a coastal dune ecosystem

source_spans.text: invasive vegetation was removed from a coastal dune complex
enhancing all indicators including: increased aeolian activity
All units experienced net increases in sediment budgets compared to a pre-restoration surface
active sand surface area increased only slightly... mostly by creation of open sand surfaces where vegetation was removed
sand bypassing through the foredune was greatest in the two months following vegetation removal
